title: RailsGroundingRef
description: A reference to a delivery-rails object grounded into a run as a receipt. Source: the grounding.rails array (holdspeak/grounding_rails.py, Phase 88). The hub resolves the ref through dw context (the CLI names the file) and reads it as opaque text; state is never scraped from markdown.

id.description: story id, phase number, or the project slug for a roadmap
